title: OpenAI Replaced GPT-5.3 Instant With GPT-5.5 Instant As Default
summary: OpenAI announced GPT-5.5 Instant as the new default ChatGPT model for all users and as the API chat-latest target, with GPT-5.3 Instant remaining available to paid users for three months before retirement.

evidence_refs.license_note: Official announcement reviewed for factual metadata; no provider prose copied.

impacts.recommended_action: Pin explicit model IDs or rerun evaluation suites if production API workloads depend on chat-latest behavior.
Plan fallback testing before the three-month paid-user availability window for GPT-5.3 Instant ends.

detail.rollout_window: Starting 2026-05-05 for all ChatGPT users and chat-latest in the API.
detail.fallback_policy: Paid users retain GPT-5.3 Instant in model configuration settings for three months before retirement.

limitations: APW computes the migration deadline as three months after the announcement date; provider-specific rollout timing can vary.
No raw announcement body is copied into APW.
